# Tool Manifest Resolution — BL-146

Data flow for declarative tool manifest: YAML file → domain parse → resolver → effective tool list per agent.

## Resolution Pipeline

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["manifest/tool-manifest.yaml"] --> B["tool_manifest_path_resolver.rs\nresolve_tool_manifest_path(root)"]
    B --> C{Path safe?}
    C -- "has .. component" --> ERR1["ManifestLoadError::PathTraversal"]
    C -- "is symlink" --> ERR2["ManifestLoadError::SymlinkRejected"]
    C -- "not found" --> ERR3["ManifestLoadError::NotFound"]
    C -- OK --> D["tool_manifest_loader.rs\nload_tool_manifest(fs, root)"]
    D --> E["Read file via FileSystem port"]
    E --> F["parse_tool_manifest(yaml_str)"]
    F --> G{Parse ok?}
    G -- "YAML anchors" --> ERR4["ManifestLoadError::ParseError\n(DoS safety)"]
    G -- "duplicate keys" --> ERR5["ParseError: DuplicateTopLevelKey"]
    G -- "OK" --> H["validate_tool_manifest(manifest)"]
    H --> I{Valid?}
    I -- "unknown preset tool" --> ERR6["Validation: UnknownToolInPreset"]
    I -- "empty preset" --> ERR7["Validation: EmptyPreset"]
    I -- "duplicate atomic tool" --> ERR8["Validation: DuplicateAtomicTool"]
    I -- "invalid preset name" --> ERR9["Validation: InvalidPresetName"]
    I -- OK --> J["ToolManifest (Value Object)"]

    J --> K["tool_manifest_resolver.rs\nresolve_effective_tools(spec, manifest)"]
    K --> L["FrontmatterToolSpec\n{ tool_set, inline_tools }"]
    L --> M{Resolution path}
    M -- "tool-set only" --> N["Expand preset → tool list"]
    M -- "inline-tools only" --> O["Use inline list directly"]
    M -- "both" --> P["Union preset + inline, dedup"]
    M -- "neither" --> ERR10["ResolveError::NeitherToolSetNorTools"]
    N & O & P --> Q{Any outlier inlines?}
    Q -- Yes --> R["ResolvedTools with warnings"]
    Q -- No --> S["ResolvedTools (clean)"]

    style ERR1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR3 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR4 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR5 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR6 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR7 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR8 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR9 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style ERR10 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style S fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style R fill:#ffd43b
```

## Data Types

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class ToolManifest {
        +tools: Vec~String~
        +presets: HashMap~String, Vec~String~~
        +MAX_MANIFEST_BYTES: usize = 1MiB
    }

    class FrontmatterToolSpec {
        +tool_set: Option~String~
        +inline_tools: Option~Vec~String~~
    }

    class ResolvedTools {
        +tools: Vec~String~
        +warnings: Vec~String~
    }

    class ManifestLoadError {
        NotFound(String)
        SymlinkRejected(String)
        PathTraversal(String)
        ReadError(String)
        ParseError(String)
        Validation(Vec~ToolManifestError~)
    }

    class ToolManifestError {
        ManifestTooLarge
        YamlAnchorsNotAllowed
        DuplicateTopLevelKey(String)
        DuplicatePresetKey(String)
        DuplicateAtomicTool(String)
        UnknownToolInPreset
        EmptyPreset(String)
        InvalidPresetName(String)
    }

    class ResolveError {
        UnknownPreset(String)
        ArrayNotSupported
        EmptyResolution
        NeitherToolSetNorTools
        InvalidToolSetReference(String)
    }

    ToolManifest --> ResolvedTools : "resolver produces"
    FrontmatterToolSpec --> ResolvedTools : "input to resolver"
    ManifestLoadError --> ToolManifestError : "wraps"
```

## Crate Ownership

| Module | Crate | Role |
|--------|-------|------|
| `tool_manifest.rs` | `ecc-domain` | Value Object, parse + validate (pure) |
| `tool_manifest_resolver.rs` | `ecc-domain` | Pure resolver (no I/O) |
| `tool_manifest_path_resolver.rs` | `ecc-app` | Canonical path computation |
| `tool_manifest_loader.rs` | `ecc-app` | FileSystem port integration |
